changes.description: Comparator display cleanup — fix dash shown for matched labelled band / one-sided threshold
changes.root_cause: formatReferenceRangeDisplay (uploadReferenceRange.ts:498) shows '—' when referenceRange is undefined. For labelled-band matched cases, referenceRange is built at buildReferenceRangeFromParserRow:279-292 only when band has numeric bounds. Additionally, lowerExclusive (parsed.ts:21) is not used in comparator assignment at line 287-289 — comparator inference relies on referenceText text-search; defaults safely to ≤/≥ if text absent.
changes.scope_constraint: Fix display only; do not change payload shape or scoring semantics

changes.description: Duplicate unit cleanup — Range unit field shows same value as Marker unit field
changes.root_cause: EditDialog.tsx:119 initialises refUnit as r?.unit ?? biomarker.unit ?? ''. Since r?.unit typically equals biomarker unit, both the Unit field (L332) and Range unit field (L489) show the same value simultaneously.
changes.scope_constraint: Change refUnit initialisation default only; do not redesign the form

changes.description: No-range-supplied classification — derived/calculated markers show 'Range needed' instead of neutral no-lab-range-supplied state
changes.root_cause: deriveReviewReferenceType (uploadReferenceRange.ts:172-174) returns undefined (not 'no_lab_range_supplied') when no bounds, no contextRangeOptions, no labelledBands. buildReferenceRangeFromParserRow:204-211 passes through parser-supplied no_lab_range_supplied only. Cursor must first verify what reference_type the backend parser emits for affected markers (Free Testosterone %, Testosterone:Free Testosterone Ratio). Frontend-only auto-classification risks false positives — fix at the parse/review seam if backend not emitting the type.
changes.scope_constraint: Verify backend emission before any frontend-only classification change; keep fix minimal and bounded; STOP if broader parser redesign is required

stop_conditions_verified: No-range fix must not require broader parser redesign — STOP if it does
Comparator fix must not change payload shape or scoring semantics — STOP if it does
Unit cleanup must not require broad edit-form redesign — STOP if it does
Sprint must not widen into general parsing-quality work — STOP if it does
regression_protection: PR4: applicability-band selection (contextRangeOptions > 1) — confirmed wired at EditDialog.tsx:375-410 and rangeAttentionLevel:343-345
PR5: labelled-band handling — confirmed wired at buildReferenceRangeFromParserRow:279-303 and rangeAttentionLevel:336-340
Ordinary bounded ranges: formatReferenceRangeDisplay:501 handles min+max case
Analysis payload shape: referenceRangeToPayload (uploadReferenceRange.ts:359-372) not in scope — must remain unchanged
determinism_risks: Comparator inference (_inferUpperComparator/_inferLowerComparator) relies on referenceText text-search — if referenceText is absent, defaults to ≤/≥ (safe fallback, not a dash); lowerExclusive band flag not currently used in this path
No-range frontend inference would be non-deterministic if applied without parser signal — mitigated by requiring backend verification first before any frontend classification change
